title: Assessment of Microplastics Pollution from Municipal Solid Waste Landfills
description: Undergraduate thesis investigating the abundance and characteristics of microplastics (MPs) in landfill sites. Utilized microscopy, FT-IR, and SEM-EDS for MPs identification and characterization.

title: Irrigation Water Management and Web-based Agricultural Information System
description: Conducted photogrammetry surveys and analyzed geospatial data across 11 districts for agricultural land use mapping utilizing ArcGIS Pro and Google Earth Pro.

title: Urban Area Civil Engineering Design Project
description: Final Year Design Project (FYDP) involving comprehensive applications of theoretical civil engineering knowledge to solve simulated practical problems for a residential area in an urban setting.

title: Water-Supply and Drainage Risk Modeling
description: Developed concept-level EPANET and SWMM models for water-supply risk assessment, supporting option testing for various network and drainage scenarios.
